listitem [ref=f2e1238]: That point is the most \"visually significant\" and is kept\n      - listitem [ref=f2e1239]: \"Result: Same visual shape with far fewer points\"\n    - heading \"Integration with uPlot\" [level=3] [ref=f2e1240]:\n      -
